# gkoreli.com

> Personal engineering blog by Goga Koreli. Agentic engineering, open source developer tools, and building in public.

## Pages

- [About](/about): About Goga Koreli — agentic product engineer, projects, and connect links.

## Posts

- [The Agentic Product Engineer](/the-agentic-product-engineer): After a decade of software engineering, becoming an agentic product engineer — what that means and why.

## Projects

- [@nisli/core](https://www.npmjs.com/package/@nisli/core): Zero-dependency reactive web component framework.
- [backlog-mcp](https://github.com/gkoreli/backlog-mcp): MCP server for AI agent task management.

## Feed

- [RSS](/feed.xml): Subscribe to new posts.
